account.name: Rock & Roll Hall of Fame (Test Data)

roles.name: Producer
roles.description: Sits behind the glass — shapes the overall sound and architecture of the record, from arrangement to final mix.

roles.name: Tour Manager
roles.description: Keeps the bus rolling — schedules, budgets, dressing rooms and the curfew at every venue.

roles.name: Studio Engineer
roles.description: Tends the desk and the patch bay — keeps takes, channels, and session metadata in order.

roles.name: Lead Guitarist
roles.description: Writes the riffs — heavy lifting on Apex, LWC, and the signature platform features.

roles.name: Frontman
roles.description: Out front with the mic — sets the band's vision, mentors the players, and faces the crowd.

roles.name: Rhythm Guitarist
roles.description: Holds the chord progressions and the groove — solid craft on customer requirements.

roles.name: Bassist
roles.description: Locks in with the drummer — quietly carries discovery and configuration through every song.

roles.name: A&R Rep
roles.description: Scouts and signs the right combinations — architects the deals (and APIs) between systems and labels.

roles.name: Session Musician
roles.description: Hired gun on the date — lays down API tracks, middleware fills, and event-driven solos under the A&R's plan.

roles.name: Roadie
roles.description: Loads in, loads out — learns the rig: webhooks, batch jobs, callouts, and the dark art of error handling.

roles.name: Drummer
roles.description: Keeps perfect time — finds the dropped beats and broken patterns before the show goes live.

roles.name: Label Boss
roles.description: Runs the imprint — sets the brand, picks the singles, and leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Promoter
roles.description: Books the tour and papers the town — strategist for campaigns and audience growth.

roles.name: Street Team Lead
roles.description: Wheat-pastes the posters and works the merch table — daily campaign execution in the field.

roles.name: Liner-Notes Writer
roles.description: Translates between the artist and the audience — captures requirements, credits, and the story behind the songs.

roles.name: Mastering Engineer
roles.description: Final polish before the lacquer — senior craft on Apex and the platform's most exacting work.

roles.name: Intern
roles.description: Coffee runs and tape splicing — learns the studio under the engineer's eye.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Punk & New Wave — CBGB Residency Platform
Hip-Hop & Rap — Block Party Sound System

classic-rock.name: Demo Tape Approved
classic-rock.description: Discovery sign-off — A&R greenlights the tour concept.

classic-rock.name: Load-in at the Garden
classic-rock.description: Build kickoff: trucks roll up to the first arena.

classic-rock.name: Live Album Mid-Tour Mix
classic-rock.description: Mid-project gate: rough mix of the live record reviewed by management.

classic-rock.name: Stadium Run Invoice
classic-rock.description: Phase invoice trigger: the second leg of the stadium run settles.

classic-rock.name: Sold-Out Final Night
classic-rock.description: Go-Live: encore at the final stadium show.

classic-rock.name: Tour Wrap & Settlement
classic-rock.description: Hyper-care close: gear back to the warehouse, accounts squared.

punk-new-wave.name: First Gig at CBGB
punk-new-wave.description: Project kickoff: the band plays its first set in the Bowery.

punk-new-wave.name: Indie 7-inch Pressed
punk-new-wave.description: Build phase: the debut single is at the plant.

punk-new-wave.name: John Peel Session Aired
punk-new-wave.description: UAT gate: tastemaker airplay confirms the sound.

punk-new-wave.name: Major-Label Showcase
punk-new-wave.description: Go-Live: A&R reps from every label in the room.

punk-new-wave.name: Tour Van Returns Home
punk-new-wave.description: Hyper-care close: the van limps back, gear unloaded.

punk-new-wave.name: Royalty Statement Posted
punk-new-wave.description: Final invoice: first publishing cheque clears.

soul-rnb.name: Songwriter Camp Closes
soul-rnb.description: Discovery: the season's hits are picked from the writers' room.

soul-rnb.name: Funk Brothers Track Date
soul-rnb.description: Build: the rhythm section cuts the album in three nights.

soul-rnb.name: Berry Gordy Listen-back
soul-rnb.description: Solution review with the label boss in Studio A.

soul-rnb.name: Single Pressed & Shipped
soul-rnb.description: Go-Live: 45s on the truck to every R&B station in the country.

soul-rnb.name: Apollo Theater Headline
soul-rnb.description: Project close: the revue packs the house in Harlem.

soul-rnb.name: Mechanicals & Royalties
soul-rnb.description: Final invoice: publishing and mechanicals clear.

hip-hop-rap.name: Cipher in the Park
hip-hop-rap.description: Kickoff: the crew freestyles all night under the boombox lights.

hip-hop-rap.name: Beat Tape Locked
hip-hop-rap.description: Discovery complete: the producer's beat tape is sequenced.

hip-hop-rap.name: Sample Clearance Signed
hip-hop-rap.description: Build: every loop and break is licensed and paid.

hip-hop-rap.name: Mixtape Drops on the Block
hip-hop-rap.description: UAT acceptance: street team pushes tapes from the trunk.

hip-hop-rap.name: Debut LP Goes Platinum
hip-hop-rap.description: Go-Live + handoff: RIAA plaque on the studio wall.

hip-hop-rap.name: Publishing Advance Cleared
hip-hop-rap.description: Final invoice: publishing advance hits the label account.

Robert Plant.notes: Voice rest — laryngitis after the Boston run.

Joe Strummer.notes: Picket line in support of the dockworkers.

Debbie Harry.notes: Photo shoot for the Village Voice cover.

Patti Smith.notes: Poetry reading at St. Mark's Church.

Aretha Franklin.notes: Detroit church — gospel residency at New Bethel Baptist.

James Brown.notes: Augusta benefit show — hardest working day of the year.

Stevie Wonder.notes: Synthesizer delivery — TONTO arrives from London.

Tupac Shakur.notes: Film shoot on location — feature role.
